name: CS-Autonomous Resolver
problem: High volume of repetitive tickets (tracking, returns) causing slow response.
how_it_works: Uses LangGraph to maintain state. Accesses Shopify APIs for order status and uses RAG for complex FAQs.
pitch: Autonomous decision-making for resolutions, not just simple chat.

name: AI Style Concierge
problem: Choice paralysis and low conversion rates.
how_it_works: Trend Researcher and Product Matcher agents analyze browsing history and social trends to suggest bundles.
tech_stack: CrewAI, LangChain, Shopify API, Instagram API
pitch: A personal shopper agent that understands intent and fashion trends.

name: ROAS Optimizer Agent
problem: Ad spend wastage due to slow manual optimization.
how_it_works: Monitors ROAS, pauses low performers, reallocates budget, generates new ad creatives.
tech_stack: LangGraph, Meta Ads API, Google Ads API, OpenAI
pitch: Runs ads like a performance marketer 24/7.

name: Stock-Predictor Agent
how_it_works: Analyzes historical sales, weather, and logistics to predict inventory needs.
tech_stack: LangChain, Pandas, Shopify API, Gmail API

name: Social-Growth Crew
problem: Inconsistent content creation and high costs.
how_it_works: Creates posts using strategist, copywriter, and media generator agents.
tech_stack: CrewAI, LangChain, Midjourney API, Buffer API
pitch: A full social media team in one AI system.

name: Shield-Agent AI
how_it_works: Analyzes IP, behavior, and order patterns to flag suspicious activity.
tech_stack: LangGraph, Shopify Risk API, IP API, SendGrid
pitch: Stops fraud before it hits your revenue.

name: Influencer-Scout Agent
problem: Manual influencer outreach is slow and inefficient.
how_it_works: Finds influencers, analyzes engagement, and sends personalized emails.
tech_stack: CrewAI, Instagram Scraper, Gmail API, LangChain

name: SEO-Dominator Agent
problem: Slow organic growth and expensive SEO agencies.
how_it_works: Performs keyword research and generates SEO-optimized blogs automatically.
tech_stack: LangChain, Google Search API, Shopify API, OpenAI
pitch: Ranks your store without hiring an agency.

name: B2B-Closer Agent
problem: Long B2B sales cycles and manual follow-ups.
how_it_works: Manages leads, negotiates deals, and generates invoices.
tech_stack: LangGraph, HubSpot API, Shopify B2B API

name: Listing-Max Agent
problem: Low CTR and conversion due to poor listings.
how_it_works: Runs A/B testing on titles and descriptions and auto-updates best performers.
tech_stack: CrewAI, LangChain, Shopify API, Google Analytics API
pitch: Continuously optimizes listings for maximum sales.
